microsoft_ft: Owned **end-to-end product strategy** for Azure's resilience validation platform, scaling from a 2-person operation to a self-service system sustaining 45+ annual drills across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, and SAP.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that cut operational toil by 30% and enabled scalable, repeatable execution.

Pioneered Azure's first **proactive resilience testing** capability — delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a 94% recovery rate, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a continuous validation model.

Directed **14 high-visibility cross-org recovery executions**, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract requiring strict auditability and compliance review.

Built an **AI agent for drill planning**, restructuring workflows using LLM-powered automation to reduce planning cycle time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21% — directly expanding program throughput.

Defined evaluation methodology and **feedback loops for AI-powered outputs**, ensuring explainability and accuracy standards that enterprise customers required — mirroring the trust-and-quality bar for production intelligence products.

Drove **$14M+ business impact** by standardizing data pipelines and normalization workflows across partner integrations, translating raw operational data into actionable intelligence for finance and engineering stakeholders.
microsoft_2023: Championed **AI-powered code generation** adoption across 14 Azure service teams, running user demos and training that drove measurable utilization and saved 37 engineering hours monthly through workflow automation.

Shaped the product roadmap toward **intent-based YAML generation** by conducting 11+ structured user interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and translating findings into prioritized bets.

Improved **data quality and retrieval accuracy** by implementing metadata normalization standards and migrating documentation to a semantic search tool, reducing lookup time by 83% across internal knowledge bases.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by aligning 140+ teams on a unified automation prioritization framework — requiring cold-start problem-solving across a fragmented cross-functional landscape.

Drove a **procurement-style discovery process** across 20+ service teams to quantify 81 hours of manual toil per region launch, then built a roadmap targeting automation of the highest-impact critical paths.

Engineered a **Power BI intelligence dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, giving leadership the benchmark data and coverage visibility needed to prioritize automation investments with confidence.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot OS migration by defining the transition strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and sequencing rollout to protect production continuity.

Prioritized a backlog of **40+ high-severity tickets** by facilitating Agile sprint planning and retrospectives, stabilizing the developer intake process and unblocking cross-functional engineering and operations teams.

Drove alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating software deployment cycles by 25% and reducing manual handoff toil in a high-throughput environment.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a CRM workflow that improved conversion at each stage of the buyer journey.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversions 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy — optimizing the website and Google profile to surface competitive pricing to the right buyers.

Identified and closed **margin leaks** by conducting financial profitability analysis across 1,000+ project records, delivering benchmark pricing intelligence that sharpened leadership's vendor and materials cost models.

tailoring_notes: 'Evaluation methodology and feedback loops for AI-powered outputs' (microsoft_ft bullet#6) mirrors JD language: 'Define the evaluation methodology, quality bar, and feedback loops for AI-powered contract analysis.'
'Benchmark pricing intelligence' and 'margin leaks' (pro_painters bullet#3) directly echo JD themes of price benchmarking, transparency, and negotiation leverage for procurement/finance buyers.
'Cold-start problem-solving across a fragmented cross-functional landscape' (microsoft_2022 bullet#1) maps to the JD's explicit callout of 'cold-start problem' as a core marketplace PM skill.
'Trust, auditability, compliance review' (microsoft_ft bullet#4) mirrors JD requirement: 'explainability, auditability, graceful degradation' and 'compliance-adjacent domains.'
'Procurement-style discovery process' (microsoft_2022 bullet#2) echoes JD language: 'Develop deep understanding of how procurement, finance, and legal teams evaluate and renegotiate vendors.'
